emails.subject: EnergyGateway Documentation
emails.body: EnergyGateway Documentation FYI, I understand from our natural gas people that they do not like the EnergyGateway form of GTC and want to transact on their platform with only counterparties where we have a master agreement in place.

emails.subject: Re: EnergyGateway Documentation
